project_specification.overview: 2-3 sentences: what you're building, what problem it solves, who it's for.
project_specification.target_audience: Who this app is built for — their role, goals, and context.

database.dev: SQLite (via env toggle for local development)

project_specification.prerequisites: - Python 3.12+ with uv installed - Node.js 18+ for frontend - Any required API keys (list here) - Environment variables: DATABASE_URL, JWT_SECRET (document in .env.example)

core_features.category: - User can register with email and password (returns 201 with user_id) - System validates email format and rejects duplicates with 409 error - System hashes passwords using bcrypt before storing in database - User can login with email and password (returns JWT access_token expiring in 15 min and refresh_token expiring in 7 days) - System returns 401 with "Invalid credentials" on failed login - User can logout and system invalidates refresh_token - System refreshes access_token automatically using a valid refresh_token (returns new access_token) - System returns 401 on all protected endpoints when token is missing or expired - User can view their profile: display name, email, account creation date - User can update their display name from the profile settings page - User can change password by providing current password and new password

- User can create a new item with title and description - User can view paginated list of their items (?page=1&per_page=20) - User can update an existing item's title or description - User can delete an item (soft delete — sets deleted_at) - System returns 403 if user tries to access another user's item - System returns 404 with descriptive message when item is not found

- UI displays loading skeleton while data is fetching - UI shows success toast notification after create/update/delete - UI shows error message when API request fails - UI is responsive on mobile (375px), tablet (768px), and desktop (1280px) - All destructive actions require a confirmation dialog before executing - App supports dark mode via system preference with manual toggle in header

table.name: users
table.column: id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid()
created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW()
updated_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW()

table.name: refresh_tokens
table.column: id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid()
user_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
expires_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL
created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW()

api_endpoints_summary.domain: POST /api/auth/register - Register new user account POST /api/auth/login - Login and receive JWT tokens POST /api/auth/logout - Logout and invalidate refresh token POST /api/auth/refresh - Refresh access token using refresh token GET /api/auth/me - Get current user profile

GET /api/items - List items with pagination POST /api/items - Create a new item GET /api/items/{id} - Get single item PUT /api/items/{id} - Update item DELETE /api/items/{id} - Delete item (soft delete)

ui_layout.structure:
Root layout: - Header bar (logo, user avatar dropdown with Settings/Logout) - Left sidebar (desktop): main navigation links - Main content area (full width on mobile, fills remaining space on desktop) - Toast notification portal (top-right)
Pages: / - Redirect to /dashboard if logged in, else /login /login - Email + password login form, link to register /register - Email + display name + password registration form /dashboard - Main content list with toolbar (search, filters) /settings - Profile settings and password change

design_system.color_palette: Primary: #f97316 (forge orange) - buttons, links, active states Secondary: #3b82f6 (blue) - secondary actions Success: #22c55e (green) - success toasts, saved states Danger: #ef4444 (red) - delete buttons, error messages Warning: #f59e0b (amber) - warning states Background: #ffffff (light) / #0f172a (dark) Surface: #f8fafc (light) / #1e293b (dark) Text: #0f172a (light) / #f1f5f9 (dark)
design_system.typography: Font family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif Headings: font-semibold Body: font-normal, leading-relaxed Code: JetBrains Mono, monospace
design_system.animations: Transitions: 150-200ms ease Loading: skeleton screens (not spinners) Modals: fade + scale in Toasts: slide-in from right, fade-out on dismiss

key_interactions.interaction: 1. User navigates to /register 2. Fills email, display name, and password 3. System creates account and returns JWT tokens 4. Redirect to /dashboard with welcome toast

1. User clicks "New Item" on /dashboard 2. Fills title and description in modal form 3. System creates item and shows it in the list 4. User clicks the item to view/edit detail 5. User clicks "Delete" — confirmation dialog appears 6. User confirms — item soft-deleted, removed from list

implementation_steps.phase: Initialize frontend (React + Vite + Tailwind) and backend (FastAPI + SQLAlchemy) Configure PostgreSQL and run initial migrations for users and refresh_tokens tables Implement POST /api/auth/register with email validation and bcrypt hashing Implement POST /api/auth/login returning JWT access and refresh tokens Implement POST /api/auth/logout and POST /api/auth/refresh Build /login and /register pages with form validation Implement JWT middleware for protecting API routes Set up CORS and rate limiting middleware

Create domain database tables and migrations Implement CRUD API endpoints with pagination Build main dashboard list view with loading skeleton Implement search and filter controls Build item detail/edit form Add form validation and inline error display

Implement responsive design (mobile, tablet, desktop) Add dark mode toggle with localStorage persistence Implement toast notification system Add confirmation dialogs for all destructive actions Write API integration tests for all happy paths and key error cases Write frontend component tests for critical UI flows Ensure test coverage reaches 90% threshold

success_criteria.functionality: All features in core_features are implemented and passing No console errors in browser during normal use Data persists correctly across sessions All API endpoints return correct HTTP status codes and error envelopes
success_criteria.ux: Responsive on mobile (375px+), tablet (768px+), and desktop (1280px+) All async operations show skeleton loading states Clear feedback for every user action (toast notifications) All destructive actions have confirmation dialogs Dark mode works across all pages and persists after refresh
success_criteria.technical_quality: Test coverage >= 90% No TypeScript or mypy type errors Proper error handling throughout JWT authentication protects all /api/* routes except /api/auth/* No secrets committed to source control (use .env files)
